signals.content_en: The U.S. Trade Representative has initiated a Section 301 investigation into forced labor and proposed additional tariffs. This may affect Chinese exports to the U.S., particularly electronics and consumer goods. Companies should assess exposure to Section 301 tariffs and BIS export controls.
signals.content_zh: 美国贸易代表办公室已发起强迫劳动301调查并拟加征关税。这可能影响中国对美出口，尤其是电子产品和消费品。企业应评估301关税和BIS出口管制风险。

checklist.desc: Ensure products have valid FCC Part 15/18 certification for U.S. market access.
Screen end users and parties against BIS Entity List and Denied Persons List.
Verify HTS codes and assess applicability of Section 301 tariffs; prepare for potential additional duties.
Determine ECCN and check if a BIS export license is required under EAR.

checklist.task: Forced labor supply chain due diligence
checklist.desc: Document supply chain traceability to mitigate forced labor allegations.

signals.content_en: Applied Materials agreed to pay $252 million penalty for illegally exporting semiconductor manufacturing equipment to China, violating BIS export controls and entity list restrictions.
signals.content_zh: 应用材料公司因非法向中国出口半导体制造设备，违反BIS出口管制和实体清单限制，同意支付2.52亿美元罚款。

checklist.desc: 确认设备ECCN编码，评估是否受EAR管制及是否需要出口许可证。
对最终用户和最终用途进行实体清单筛查，确保不涉及被禁实体。
确认HTS编码是否在301关税清单内，计算附加关税并准备原产地证明。
获取并保留最终用户和最终用途声明，确保不涉及军事用途。
如需要，向BIS提交出口许可证申请，附上技术说明和交易文件。

signals.content_en: The US Department of Commerce revised license review policy for semiconductors exported to China, tightening controls on advanced chips and related equipment. Exporters must align with BIS Entity List restrictions and Section 301 tariff exposure.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部修订了对华出口半导体的许可证审查政策，加强了对先进芯片及相关设备的管控。出口商必须遵守BIS实体清单限制并评估301条款关税风险。

checklist.desc: Screen all parties against BIS Entity List and Denied Persons List; obtain end-user/end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
Map 10-digit HTS code to Section 301 lists; calculate additional duties and document country of origin.
Confirm FCC ID and modular approval for wireless components; retain supplier declarations.
Determine if ECCN requires BIS license; apply for license if needed and document classification.
Collect and retain end-use statements and end-user certifications for all controlled items.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce rescinded a Biden-era firearms rule, restoring common sense to export controls on civilian firearms. This change reduces licensing requirements for certain civilian firearms exports, but exporters must still comply with ITAR and other applicable regulations.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部撤销了拜登时期的枪支规则，恢复了对民用枪支出口管制的常识性做法。这一变化减少了某些民用枪支出口的许可要求，但出口商仍需遵守ITAR及其他适用法规。

checklist.desc: 确认产品是否仍受ITAR管辖或已转至EAR管辖，并获取正确的ECCN编码。
对最终用户和最终用途进行BIS实体清单筛查，确保无受制裁方。
评估产品是否受Section 301关税影响，并准备原产地证明文件。
核对10位HTS编码，确保与最新美国海关要求一致。

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has expanded the Entity List to cover affiliates of listed entities. This means that any entity owned or controlled by a listed entity may also be subject to export restrictions. Exporters must conduct enhanced due diligence to identify affiliates and ensure compliance.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部已将实体清单扩展至涵盖被列实体的关联公司。这意味着任何由被列实体拥有或控制的实体也可能受到出口限制。出口商必须进行加强的尽职调查，以识别关联公司并确保合规。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
Review corporate ownership and control structures to identify any affiliates of listed entities in the supply chain.
Obtain and verify end-use and end-user certifications, especially for dual-use items and military applications.
Assess whether a BIS export license is required based on ECCN, destination, and end-user; apply if needed.

signals.content_en: The Department of Commerce has closed a loophole that allowed foreign-owned semiconductor fabs in China to bypass U.S. export controls. This action tightens restrictions on the export of advanced semiconductor manufacturing equipment and technology to these facilities, requiring licenses for shipments that were previously exempt. Companies must now ensure compliance with BIS regulations, including screening for Entity List involvement and verifying end-use.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部已堵住允许中国境内外资半导体晶圆厂规避美国出口管制的漏洞。此举加强了对向这些设施出口先进半导体制造设备和技术的限制，要求对先前豁免的货物申请许可证。企业必须确保遵守BIS法规，包括筛查实体清单参与情况并核实最终用途。

checklist.desc: 对涉及半导体制造设备或技术的出口进行BIS管制分类，确认是否受EAR管制，并筛查实体清单和最终用途限制。

checklist.task: 最终用户与最终用途核查
checklist.desc: 获取并审核最终用户声明，确保不涉及中国境内外资晶圆厂或军事最终用途，必要时提交最终用户证明。
对于受控物项，准备并提交BIS出口许可证申请，包括技术说明、最终用户信息和用途说明。
确认10位HTS编码，评估是否受Section 301附加关税影响，并正确申报原产地和完税价格。
如涉及无线通信设备，确保产品已获得FCC Part 15/18认证，并保留供应商FCC ID记录。

signals.content_en: Commerce eases export controls on Syria, reducing restrictions for certain items. However, for US-bound exports, standard BIS export controls and entity list screening still apply. No Syria-specific changes affect US export compliance.
signals.content_zh: 美国商务部放宽对叙利亚的出口管制，降低部分物项的限制。但对美出口仍需遵守标准BIS出口管制和实体清单筛查。叙利亚相关变化不影响对美出口合规。

checklist.desc: Confirm intentional radiators, modular approvals, and supplier FCC IDs for wireless electronics before US entry.
Map the 10-digit HTS line against Section 301 lists and additional duties; document country of origin and value build-up.
Run restricted party and export control screening; retain end-user and end-use statements for controlled semiconductors.
